Culture-Art Events

MyKHAS

Türkçe

Culture-Art Events

Kadir Has University hosts a wide range of cultural and
artistic events throughout the year.

From concerts and festivals to international cultural days
and exhibitions across various art disciplines, our campus offers a vibrant and
inspiring social environment for all.

These events, many of which feature prominent figures from
the world of culture and the arts, are open not only to members of our
university but also to the broader public.

Each year, the campus hosts around 200 events, with over 20
of them focusing specifically on culture and the arts.

At Kadir Has University, culture and art are an integral
part of campus life.
